_comment: All processor sources are now consolidated under vector-coprocessor/. build_dir is relative to bench/.

processors.name: riscvbyp
processors.label: 5-stage bypass
processors.description: Course-provided 5-stage bypassing pipeline with iterative muldiv. Baseline.

processors.name: riscvlong
processors.label: Longer pipeline
processors.description: Longer pipeline with fully pipelined integer multiply/divide; eliminates muldiv stalls.

processors.name: riscvooo
processors.label: OOO dual-issue
processors.description: Out-of-order dual-issue superscalar with scoreboard and ROB.

processors.name: riscvvec
processors.label: Vector + 5-stage
processors.description: 5-stage bypassing pipeline with decoupled vector coprocessor (master design).

processors.name: riscvvec-chained
processors.label: Vector + chaining
processors.description: Vector coprocessor with Cray-style producer/consumer chaining.
